description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized stone with a predominantly light gray to off-white coloration, accented by distinct brownish and ochre mineral streaks and patches. The surface is rough and uneven, with several protrusions and angular edges, giving it a rugged, natural appearance. The stone displays visible weathering, with some areas appearing smoother and others more granular, suggesting prolonged exposure to the elements. The brown mineral bands form irregular, almost linear patterns across the stone, adding visual interest and a sense of geological history. Its size and mass make it suitable as a physical barrier or decorative element in urban landscapes such as parks, sidewalks, or garden paths. The stone is solid throughout, with no visible cavities or receptacle features.
description: A rugged, irregularly shaped stone with light gray and brown mineral streaks, rough texture, and weathered surface. Distinctive brown bands and protrusions give it a natural, aged appearance.
description_view_0: This view highlights the broadest face of the stone, showcasing a prominent brown mineral streak crossing diagonally and several smaller patches.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the elongated profile and the continuation of the brown streak, with more visible surface roughness and a pronounced edge.
description_view_2: From this angle, the stone's angular protrusions and the depth of the brown mineral band are most apparent, revealing its uneven thickness.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the stone's tapering end and the transition from brown to lighter gray, with less visible mineral patterning and a more uniform surface.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or barrier along walkways
attribute_pattern: Irregular brown and ochre mineral streaks and patches, forming natural, non-repetitive linear and blotchy patterns across the surface.
attribute_weathering: Rough and granular with visible signs of surface erosion and mineral exposure, indicating moderate weathering from outdoor conditions.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts moderately with paved surfaces but blends naturally with soil, gravel, or landscaped greenery; may partially integrate with ground cover or adjacent stones.
